Squat.description: Lower your hips as if sitting back into a chair, keeping your chest up and back straight.

rules.name: Knee Angle
rules.message: Squat depth is off! Stay between 60-90 degrees.

rules.name: Torso Angle
rules.message: Keep your chest up! Don't lean forward.

Push-up.description: Lower your body until your chest nearly touches the floor, keeping your elbows tucked and body straight.

rules.name: Body Line Angle
rules.message: Straighten your body! Don't let your hips sag.

rules.name: Elbow Angle
rules.message: Adjust your depth! Elbows should be 60-90 degrees.

Plank.description: Maintain a push-up position with your body in a straight line to build core stability.

rules.name: Core Stability
rules.message: Lower your hips! Your body should be a straight line.

Bicep-Curl.description: Curl the weight toward your shoulder while keeping your upper arm stationary.

rules.name: Full Extension
rules.message: Don't lock your elbows! Maintain muscle tension.

Lunge.description: Step forward and lower your hips until both knees are bent at a 90-degree angle, keeping your torso upright and front knee behind toes.

rules.name: Front Knee Angle
rules.message: Front knee is too far forward! Keep it around 90 degrees.

rules.name: Torso Upright
rules.message: Keep your torso upright! You are leaning too far forward.

Jumping-Jack.description: Jump while spreading your legs and clapping your hands overhead, then return to starting position.

rules.name: Arm Width
rules.message: Clap your hands at the top! Bring your arms higher.

Shoulder-Press.description: Push the weights directly overhead until your arms are fully extended, then lower them back to shoulder level while keeping your core engaged.

rules.name: Elbow Flare
rules.message: Don't drop your elbows too low! Keep them at 90 degrees or slightly above.

Glute-Bridge.description: Lie on your back and lift your hips toward the ceiling by squeezing your glutes.

rules.name: Hip Extension
rules.message: Squeeze your glutes! Push your hips higher toward the ceiling.

Lateral-Raise.description: Lift arms out to the sides until they are level with shoulders.

rules.name: Arm Height
rules.message: Don't lift too high! Stop at shoulder level.

Side-Plank.description: Maintain a sided straight line to build core stability.

rules.name: Hip Alignment
rules.message: Keep your hips high! Your body should be a straight diagonal.

Sit-up.description: Lie on your back with knees bent, then lift your torso toward your knees while keeping your core engaged.

rules.name: Torso Range
rules.message: Don't over-flex! Keep the movement controlled.

Mountain Climber.description: From a plank position, alternate bringing your knees toward your chest as if running in place.

rules.name: Knee Drive
rules.message: Bring your knee closer to your chest for a full rep!
